title: cinchona formosa
intro: Cinchona formosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the red cinchona or yellow cinchona. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and is a source of quinine, a natural antimalarial compound. The medicinal properties of Cinchona formosa include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of malaria, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of using Cinchona formosa include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which can also help to soothe digestive issues and relieve pain, often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
